response.justification: The candidate is a strong individual contributor with ~15 years across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, plus genuine depth in testing infrastructure and developer tooling (a D test runner, an assertion library, CI/CD setup, test-automation courses) that maps well to the engineering-productivity focus. However, this is a people-leadership role requiring 2+ years of people management and 3+ years of technical leadership, and the resume shows no evidence of managing engineers, running one-on-ones, owning team roadmaps, or leading organizational change. The mobile experience (iOS/Apple TV) is real but dated to ~2016. The core management requirement is unmet.
strengths: Deep developer-tooling and test-automation experience (test runner, assertion library, CI/CD)
Long, broad engineering background including mobile, backend, and embedded systems
Demonstrated knowledge-sharing through workshops and courses, relevant to team development
concerns: No demonstrated people-management or formal team-leadership experience
No evidence of roadmap ownership or leading organizational change
Mobile-platform exposure is limited and roughly a decade old; recent career gap
